rationale: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue as before; Trump's Iran deal comments are rhetoric only — no qualitative change affecting Poland's security or energy situation. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut; Trump condemns but says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Ongoing Beirut strikes continue without escalation change; Trump's Iran deal comments remain unconfirmed rhetoric. Indirect energy price risk for Poland unchanged.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU-Ukraine accession talks formally advancing, relevant to Poland as neighbor and advocate, but no qualitative leap beyond established process.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian oil tanker accused of funding Ukraine war
top_events.summary: UK action against Russian shadow fleet is a minor positive signal for sanctions enforcement, with limited direct impact on daily life in Poland.
